dialogues.text_en: From here on out, we won't stop working till the train's ready.
If you have any preparations, now would be a good time to see to them. The boarding call will come before you know it!
Right, we're just about done with the modifications. But I have to stress that we cannot afford a test run.
It's fine—we understand and accept the risks. We have faith in you and your craft.
I'm sure everything will go to plan. With all the hard work everyone's put in, it couldn't be otherwise!
Finished at last!!!
Behold, the pinnacle of locomotive engineering—the Dawnblazer!
Amazing!
Yep, she's been fitted with wooden armor and a crystal grounding rod to mitigate the effects of lightning. Naturally, we had to overhaul the engine so it could handle the extra weight.
I also had her outfitted with aetheric cannons, the better to contend with enemy forces. And as they're modeled upon those used at the Crystarium, I can attest to their potency.
So, what do you reckon? Given the tight turnaround, I'd say we did a damn good job.
Glad she's to your liking. I hate to let go of such a beautiful piece of machinery, but I know you'll give her a proper send-off for us.
At the risk of spoiling the mood, we should probably get moving.
Yep. You won't get far if you let 'em pummel you from the air, but you'll be safe enough once you reach the tunnel.
In that case, I will conceal the train with a spell once everyone is on board.
It should last long enough for us to reach the tunnel unnoticed.
Right. So everyone—are we ready!?
We've done all we can. Rest is up to you.
I won't let you down!
All aboard!
Vanish!
At this speed, we should arrive at the dome in no time at all!
But not before we're spotted, I expect. Stay alert!
Here we go.
Stand fast, everyone!
[CASTING SPELL EXERT “Hah!”]
No you don't!
[CASTING SPELL SHARP EXHALE]
Have care! They've switched to firearms!
Oh dear...
Raha! Jump!
[JUMPING EXERTION]
[STAGGERED BY BLAST EXERTION “Ugh!”]
Erenville! I need you to take over for me!
End of the line, everyone!
Stubborn little—!
That was too close...
Still alive, Erenville?
Mostly...
At last, the enemy stronghold... We should hurry before they can regroup.
Let's go and find out what's inside!
There's no way Zoraal Ja will be able to ignore our explosive entrance.
The idea of venturing into enemy territory is daunting, but I believe I'm ready. Or as ready as I'll ever be...
Just a little further and we'll be inside the dome!
We couldn't have made it this far without the train. Let us see to it we go the rest of the way.
I'll remain out of sight until the fighting is over. At the risk of repeating myself, try not to do anything reckless.
The rest is up to you now. I can make my own way back, so don't worry about me. Take care and good luck!
Ah, it's you. Wawlika told me you may be passing through. Be careful out there.
Vanguard is under attack! Vanguard is under attack! All units prepare for battle!
Intruders detected.
Combat mode activated.
Enemy sighted. R7 sentries, prepare to engage.
Ready to engage.
Eliminating Vanguard threat.
Warning: intruders detected. Initializing extermination protocol.
Wingblade engaged. Preparing high-speed maneuvers.
Combat proficiency exceeds expected parameters. Requesting reinforcements.
Authorization to disengage limiters granted. All units─commence firing.
All units─prepare for aerial bombardment.
Redeploying wingblade. Thrusters engaged.
Initiating secondary directive: electrope weapon testing.
Alert. Alert. Intruders detected. Engaging defense turrets.
Intruder alert. Intruder alert.
Intruders detected... Initiating purge protocol.
Turrets deployed. Commencing remote volley.
Restricting enemy movement. Electrofencing activated.
Enemy vital signs detected... Initiating raze protocol.
Enemy breach imminent. Relaying emergency signal.
Dammit all... Power the Crossbridge and release the beasts! We can stop them there!
Send in reinforcements! The commander will not tolerate failure!
Purging hostiles.
Resistance is futile.
That such a serious breach should be allowed... But it ends now.
We redeem our honor with your lives!
You truly believe yourself a match for us? The audacity!
On your knees!
Zoraal Ja will have your head on a pike!
You still stand. Impressive...
Know your place!
H-How...? How could you... Ugh...
All right. No more games!
I call on the soul of the serpent, the great devourer. Give me the strength to destroy our enemies.
You'll pay for the souls you've made me waste this day.
I'll tear you limb from limb!
Give up now and I'll make this quick!
None can survive the serpent's art!
That was a most unexpected transformation.
He was more snake than man by the end...
Now to see what's inside the dome.
Right! Let's get moving!
Time to make them pay!
Right, let's give them a sound thrashing!
Let's get inside, quickly!
Finally, time to go on the offensive!
The way is open. We should hurry.
Zoraal Ja holds command over all of this?
Well, that didn't take long.
Bring it on!
Is everyone ready?
This is not at all like the Garleans or the Allagans.
I daresay we've not seen its like before.
Are we still in their encampment?
Who could have built all this?
A red vehicle. An indication of rank, perhaps?
Well, they have good taste in colors, I'll give them that.
What have we here?
No doubt it's as swift as the others. Have care.
That was close!
Well, that's one way to fight.
Was that a blade just now?
Such speed...
Above us!
They mean to drop bombs on us?
Look out!
Stand clear!
So far, so good.
They'll have to try harder than that.
Let's keep moving.
Here they come!
Watch out!
Is there no end to their defenses?
Everything appears to be made of the same strange substance.
This place just keeps getting stranger and stranger.
The sooner we can leave this place, the better.
Nowhere to go but forward, it seems...
I was only joking when I said they need to try harder.
Well, well. What have we here?
Hmph. Another hunk of metal for the scrap pile.
This one is rather imposing, isn't it?
Careful! It makes ready to strike!
What manner of weapon is this?
Do they really need so many weapons?
All we have to do is dodge. Easy...right?
What now?
The air is thick with lightning aether.
Careful not to touch those barriers.
I'd rather not get shocked if I can help it.
Glad that's over with.
Hah, that was too easy!
How much further, I wonder?
How was Zoraal Ja able to conceive of such weaponry?
The walls hum with energy!
Let's deal with this quickly and get going!
We'll not be so easily discouraged.
Did they really think this would deter us?
Is this the best they can do?
If it is, we'll be through in no time at all.
They're growing desperate.
As if this would stop us.
We must be getting close to an exit.
This one appears to be human.
This is their leader?
Something's not right about this.
So they're all that stands between us and the way out?
Oh. Over already...
We did it!
It's the same as Zoraal Ja!
What!? But how?
That was no resurrection magick...
On your guard, everyone!
He looks more snake than man now.
Wh-What is that !?
A harrowing transformation.
It's not unlike the chimeras of Allag.
What greeted us was not the home that I had left behind.
There was no mistaking we had reached Yyasulani, and yet...
It was wholly unlike my memories. The lands of my childhood had changed beyond imagining.
To where had I returned?
We tread on, the darkened skies above a mirror to my heart. Clouded with fear and uncertainty.
How...bizarre.
This cannot be Yyasulani, can it?
This is Yyasulani...?
What happened here...?
I don't know what I was expecting, but it wasn't this.
There was no sensation of passing into a different world. This couldn't be a reflection...could it?
I was prepared for something strange, but this... It's like another world.
I...I don't understand...
